policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-adb-r04 - Deny public IP for Azure Databricks Clusters'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Databricks#IncidentremediationDatabricks#drcp-adb-r04 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP Azure Databricks Clusters should have public IP disabled
policyDefinition.description: Disabling public IP of clusters in Azure Databricks Workspaces improves security by ensuring that the clusters aren't exposed on the public internet.

drcp.name: DatabricksPublicIPMustBeDisabled
drcp.controlDesc: Deny public IP for Azure Databricks Clusters

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
